name: initial_block_with_display
description: Code should include an initial block containing $display system task for simulation-time messaging
snippet: initial if(|memfile) begin $display("Preloading %m from %s", memfile); $readmemh(memfile, mem); end

name: initial_block_with_readmemh
description: Code should include an initial block with $readmemh for loading memory contents from file at simulation start
snippet: initial if(|memfile) begin $display("Preloading %m from %s", memfile); $readmemh(memfile, mem); end

name: conditional_initial_block_with_file_variable
description: Code should include a conditional initial block using a file path variable to conditionally execute simulation-only operations
snippet: initial if(|memfile) begin $display("Preloading %m from %s", memfile); $readmemh(memfile, mem); end
